stemHtml:
The term 'screen height' refers to the...

1. Minimum height above ground when passing the final approach fix
2. Height at the end of the take-off distance required (TODR)
3. Height above the aerodrome reference point
4. Required height to safely overfly mountainous areas
5. Minimum ILS approach height when non-visual with the runway
6. Height at the beginning of the landing distance required (LDR)
